items.html: You should also know that in order for the light of Ein Sof to be able to shine in all of Atzilut, its self must be clothed inside Hochma 1. After it is clothed in Hochma, it expands in all of Atzilut. Only by that clothing can all of Atzilut receive from Ein Sof. This is the meaning of the verse, “You have made them all in wisdom [Hochma]. 2”

But in order to shine in Beria, Hochma must be clothed ‎in Bina. Through those two, when the light of Ein Sof clothes within them, it shines in Beria. This is the meaning of the screen between Atzilut and Beria, for this screen is extended from Bina, where Hochma is clothed so as to shine in Beria.

In order to shine in Yetzira, it adds one more screen and clothing, by Bina clothing in Tifferet, too. After that, Ein Sof shines in Yetzira through Tifferet. In order to shine in Assiya, it adds another screen and clothing, which is that Tifferet clothes in Malchut, too, and Ein Sof shines to all of Assiya through Malchut. This is the meaning of “Upper Ima nests in the chair, the middle pillar nests in Yetzira, and Malchut nests in Assiya.”

Indeed, to improve your understanding, know that the verse says, “You have made them all in wisdom.” It means that in Atzilut, the light of Ein Sof is clothed in Hochma 3, and through it, it shines in all of Atzilut. This wisdom shall be clarified to you from what I had told you, that “for one higher than the high watches,” etc., and there are several worlds above Atzilut 4, and in that Hochma that there is above Atzilut 5, Ein Sof clothes within it and shines in Atzilut.

Thus, when he wanted to shine in Beria 6, he also clothed Bina in Atzilut, which is above Beria, and by that Bina, he shines in Beria 7. Also, in order to shine in Yetzira 8, he clothes in Tifferet of Beria. Likewise, from Yetzira to Assiya, he clothes in Malchut of Yetzira. So is the matter in Atzilut, as in order to shine in Atzilut, he clothes in the above-mentioned Hochma that above Atzilut, and through it, he shines in Atzilut. Thus, do not think that it is the Hochma of Atzilut itself.
